title: Implement LCI raw diagnostics client/UI flows
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-py4c.1.13. spec/11-lci.md now defines optional admin-only raw diagnostics resources under /diag/raw/*, but the Python native client/TUI only exposes generic /diag flattening and redaction. Implement typed no-hardware client/UI flows only when the product decision is to expose raw diagnostics: status GET /diag/raw/rx, finite arming PUT /diag/raw/rx, event Observe /diag/raw/rx/events, and POST /diag/raw/tx with explicit unsupported/error states. Do not use the historical spec/lichen-native CBOR raw_tx/raw_rx messages.
acceptance_criteria: Python fake-transport tests cover /diag/raw/rx status, arming TTL, /diag/raw/rx/events Observe, /diag/raw/tx POST, unsupported 4.04/5.01 behavior, admin-gated UI state, and redaction of raw frame payloads. Existing native client tests still pass without BLE adapters, radios, boards, or firmware.
notes:
Implemented software-only LCI raw diagnostics client/TUI flows. Added typed Python models and LciClient methods for GET /diag/raw/rx, finite PUT /diag/raw/rx arming, Observe /diag/raw/rx/events, and POST /diag/raw/tx. 4.04 and 5.01 map to explicit unsupported state; other non-success raw diagnostics results map to error state. No historical spec/lichen-native CBOR raw_tx/raw_rx fallback was used.

TUI Diag screen now advertises raw diagnostics from /diag, redacts raw frame leaves, requires explicit admin enablement before touching /diag/raw/*, and exposes key-reachable flows: a enables admin/raw refresh, u arms raw RX for 60s, o observes raw RX events in Diag mode, x posts a bounded raw diagnostic test frame. Unsupported arm/TX/Observe results render raw.resources unsupported.

Tests/checks run locally: python/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q python/tests/client/test_lci.py python/tests/tui/test_native.py -> 78 passed in 13.22s. python/.venv/bin/python -m ruff check python/src/lichen/client/model.py python/src/lichen/client/lci.py python/src/lichen/client/__init__.py python/src/lichen/tui/native.py python/tests/client/test_lci.py python/tests/tui/test_native.py -> All checks passed. git diff --check -> passed.

Code review: initial two reviewers found admin-gating/key-reachability/unsupported-render P1/P2 issues; fixed. Final independent reviews: Singer the 9th no P0/P1/P2 findings; Confucius the 9th no P0/P1/P2 findings. No EC2 needed: Python/TUI no-hardware tests only.
close_reason: Completed: typed Python LCI raw diagnostics client methods and key-reachable TUI admin/arm/observe/TX flows implemented; fake-transport tests and TUI tests pass; reviews clean.
